title: What the Bible actually says about self-control
caption:
Self-control isn't a discipline you force. Scripture calls it a fruit — something that grows in you when you stay near the Source.

The man trying to white-knuckle his way out of porn, the phone, the anger — he keeps losing because he's fighting on the wrong terrain. Biblical self-control starts with transformation, not effort. Cut the access before the appetite fires. Stay in the Word. Get a brother who can call you out.

You're not the manufacturer. You're the soil.

#faith #selfcontrol #christianmen #godlymen #discipline #scripture #manofgod
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
